title: ilex glabella
intro: Ilex glabella, also known as the Evergreen Holly, is a species of holly native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex glabella are numerous, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Ilex glabella can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
